Hello everybody. So I'm not finished creating the app for the BAByBooty Boot Camp opt-in, but I figured why not just create it on the video. That way you can see it firsthand. So here we go. This is for the opt-ins app opt-in submission, whatever you want to call it same thing. So the first step is click funnels as usual new contact activity. Just click this little guy right here, knock on click funnels door and then boom, it should have the list of your funnels. My click funnels account is a ton of funnels. So it'll probably load even faster for yours. And then this is going to come from the opt-in page of the big booty boot camp funnel. As normal, you want to make sure you have your sample in there already. And then the next step is agile. So once you pull your sample to test this successful click agile as the next step. And in agile, you will want to create a contact. So this will create a contact creator update in case it's somebody that's already an agile, you just want to update. And then make sure your agile account is connected and email. So email, it'll pull it from click funnels. First name, guess where that's coming from click funnels. Last name, same thing, right there. And you definitely want phone number. And you definitely want to add a tag. In this case, the tag that triggers the campaign in agile is BBB all caps. That's just what I've made it in my agile account, you can do the same. I highly suggest it's much easier when everything is in caps, because capitalization matters a lot in agile. And if something is incorrect, it will, it will not work, it will not trigger the campaign. So you want to make sure that's changed to yes, by the way. And yeah, other than that, you click continue. Boom, send test to agile. This will probably fail because I think I'm already a contact in agile. There we go, it worked.
